case_title: ALL AMERICAN TILE AND TERRAZZO, INC. VS. LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2007 ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED.BY JUDGE PRO TEM. STEVE LAU; CLERK: F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL AMERICAN TILE AND TERRAZZO, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION INC. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF FOR $109.50 COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALL AMERICAN TILE AND TERRAZZO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $59.50). SERVED NOV-19-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LC GENERAL ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2007 - JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. ON CROSS-COMPLAINT JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT.
